title: Festive 15cm Santa Sleigh Crackle Glass Ball – LED Christmas Decoration with Warm Lights & Winter Scene – Battery Operated Indoor Ornament
features: CLASSIC FESTIVE DESIGN – Crackle glass ball with a charming Santa sleigh winter scene, perfect for table or mantle displays.
15 CM DIAMETER – Compact size ideal for adding gentle Christmas lighting to windowsills, shelves and centrepieces.
LED GLOW EFFECT – Internal warm white LEDs illuminate the crackle finish for a magical festive shimmer.
BATTERY OPERATED – Powered by 3 × AAA batteries (not included) for flexible, cable-free indoor decorating.
REUSABLE DECORATION – Durable glass design suitable for year-after-year Christmas use, gifting or seasonal styling.
description: Create a warm festive glow in your home this season with the Festive 15cm Santa Sleigh Crackle Glass Ball. This enchanting Christmas decoration features an elegant crackle glass finish illuminated from within by soft LED lighting, bringing a magical ambience to windowsills, tables, mantles, and cosy corners throughout your home. Designed with a charming winter scene, the artwork shows Santa riding in his sleigh through a snow-covered forest, complete with reindeer and pine trees. As the internal LEDs shine through the textured glass, the decoration displays a beautiful warm shimmer that transforms any room into a festive wonderland. At 15 cm in diameter, this glass crackle ball is perfectly sized to stand alone as a glowing centrepiece or sit alongside your Christmas displays without taking up too much space. Battery operation ensures total flexibility when positioning the decoration – no plugs or cables required. Simply insert three AAA batteries (not included), switch on, and enjoy the soft golden glow throughout the season. Ideal for festive decorating, gifting, or creating a relaxing Christmas atmosphere, this Santa Sleigh Crackle Ball adds timeless elegance and gentle sparkle. Use it year after year to make your home feel warm, welcoming, and wonderfully Christmassy.
